company1.title: ELM Technologies
company1.description: Working on embeddable widget solutions and lead generation tools using Vue.js, with backend involvement in Python/Django to deliver full-cycle features.
tasks: Developed embeddable widgets in Vue 2/3 for integration into third-party platforms
Built and maintained lead forms with complex validation and submission flows
Wrote unit and integration tests for Vue components to ensure stability
Contributed to backend development using Python and Django REST Framework

company2.title: Mozen
company2.description: Full-cycle development across web and mobile platforms — from React Native apps to Next.js web migrations, working in a Scrumban team with Firebase and Parse Platform integrations.
tasks: Developed and maintained a cross-platform mobile app in React Native with offline-first support
Built native Android features in Kotlin alongside the React Native codebase
Migrated web application to Next.js with SSR support and PWA optimization
Integrated Firebase (Auth, Firestore, Cloud Functions) and Parse Platform for scalable backend
Set up CI/CD pipelines for both mobile and web applications
Participated in code reviews and contributed to architecture decisions

company3.title: Open Mobile Platform
company3.description: Technical lead for a developer portal project — designed architecture, led a development team, and delivered a full-featured platform with WIKI, CMS, search, and an intelligent assistant.
tasks: Designed architecture for the developer portal with focus on content publication speed
Led technical direction and managed a team of developers
Implemented WIKI, forum, CMS, and a search system with history and smart suggestions
Built an intelligent assistant integrated into the developer portal
Configured and supported GitLab CI/CD pipelines for automated builds and deployments
Authored full project documentation covering architecture, infrastructure, and deployment

company4.title: Getarent
company4.description: Served as technical expert on a marketplace platform — contributed to product strategy, led architecture decisions, built new features, and managed infrastructure in Kubernetes.
tasks: Developed new marketplace features and improved existing ones in React / Next.js
Participated in strategic sessions with top management and investors
Designed new architectural solutions and defined team coding standards
Managed infrastructure: deployed and optimized services in Kubernetes on Yandex Cloud
Wrote SQL scripts for data extraction and migrated logic to database level (views, triggers, procedures)
Conducted technical interviews and supported team in task planning and estimation

company5.title: IT Special
company5.description: Worked across multiple client projects in a consulting agency — from video streaming services to school management systems, handling both development and technical leadership tasks.
tasks: Developed web applications in TypeScript with React / Next.js and Vue / Nuxt.js
Led Nuxt 2 to Nuxt 3 migration and maintained legacy codebases
Designed and built a menuboard constructor with Quick Resto integration
Developed a school schedule module for the iDesk system
Optimized Webpack build configuration on existing projects
Conducted technical interviews and prepared test assignments for candidates

company6.title: Consalt Info
company6.description: Delivered a wide range of commercial projects — from admin panels and booking platforms to mobile apps and interactive 3D maps — growing from solid execution to active architectural involvement.
tasks: Built an admin panel for managing suppliers, logistics, orders, and advertising
Developed a psychologist matching platform with booking and personal accounts
Created a 3D building map with apartment selection and application submission
Developed 2 React Native mobile apps released to production
Contributed to design system development and architecture discussions
Led sprint planning, task estimation, and team task distribution

company7.title: ADD.Orange
company7.description: Started professional career building client websites and internal tools — from WordPress and Bitrix projects to custom React applications, handling both frontend and backend independently.
tasks: Designed project architecture and selected tech stacks for client projects
Developed WordPress and Bitrix websites with custom themes and admin panels
Built an informational portal with a custom PHP admin panel from scratch
Administered servers and managed deployments independently
Finalized UI designs and implemented pixel-perfect layouts
Delivered 2 full projects end-to-end — from client discussions to production
